# thoth_pam_settings (Resource)

Manages tenant PAM step-up integration settings.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `pam_callback_secret` (String, Sensitive) Shared secret for PAM callback validation.
- `pam_enabled` (Boolean) Enable PAM step-up callback integration.
- `pam_provider` (String) PAM provider slug.
- `pam_request_auth_token` (String, Sensitive) Outbound PAM auth token.
- `pam_request_secret` (String, Sensitive) Outbound PAM request secret.
- `pam_request_timeout_seconds` (Number) Outbound PAM request timeout in seconds.
- `pam_request_url` (String) Outbound PAM request URL.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Terraform resource identifier (tenant ID).
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant ID resolved from provider configuration.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp returned by GovAPI.
